title: Molecular neuroscience community shares perspectives.
author_string: Gura, Trisha, Acker-Palmer, Amparo, Kolodkin, Alex, Meijers, Rob, Mizuno, Naoko et al.
abstract: In May, an interdisciplinary group gathered in Crete for the Molecular Neurobiology Workshop. Scientists shared data acquired by vastly diverse techniques to understand how the nervous system, with only a limited number of components, is assembled to respond to infinite stimuli. Ideas of molecular cues, timing, switching, and context emerged.
